items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Take it. It's the last badge. You're indeed strong.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: With your strength, maybe... I'll forge a report just like they do this time.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Do you new participants really think the Seaside Arena is a place for you to hone your skills?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: To be frank with you, the Seaside Arena is now a steering wheel held by those high-ranked factions.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: They can ensure they're always at the top of the leaderboard. Even this rule is one of their tactics to maintain their positions.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: The three trials you just passed not only screen out the unqualified but also give them a chance to precisely assess the strength of the participants, gathering information.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: In this case, they can be well-prepared in the official match. And, we examiners are responsible for submitting the assessment reports to those factions.

options.text: Why are you telling me this?
Can I trust what you're saying?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Because I see hope in you. I think you can help me regain my freedom.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Believe it or not. Honestly, I see hope in you. I think you can help me regain my freedom.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: I was once a challenger in the Seaside Arena. However, my obsession with victory led me to lose my own freedom.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Later, I discovered it was a trap set by those high-ranked factions, waiting for the innocent to jump into it.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: In this survival-of-the-fittest world, only strength speaks.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: I no longer have the power to change it, but maybe you can. I've seen countless challengers, and I have keen observation.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Will you be my last resort?

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to tonight's electrifying matches at the Seaside Arena!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: The energy in the air is palpable; I can feel your enthusiasm building up!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Tonight, we have a brand-new challenger stepping into the pit!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: As a fresh face in the arena, {Male=he;Female=she}'s about to embark on an exciting career. Let's delve into {Male=his;Female=her} introduction!

options.text: I don't recall writing that for myself...

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: The collective beliefs in this arena will manifest into a resounding courage, piercing through the sky and lighting the way forward.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Introducing the new blood from The Hyenas! The spotlight of tonight's showdown! Let's give a roaring welcome to Rover, the Dark Envoy!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: It's the first time I've delivered such impassioned opening remarks. Anticipate an unforgettable performance from {Male=he;Female=she} tonight!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Ladies and gentlemen, our first match tonight features Rover facing off against the renowned and skilled participant. Please join me in welcoming Mira the Danger!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Now, before we dive into the action, do either of you have any words for your opponent?

items.speaker: Dangerous Exile
items.text: One word.

items.speaker: Dangerous Exile
items.text: I'll either dominate or endure.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Direct and to the point! Rover, how about you?

options.text: I'm wondering who my next opponent will be.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Confidence stands tall as the challenger's mightiest weapon. Who will emerge victorious in this opening round? Ladies and gentlemen, hold your breath and watch!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: That's a robust response. Who will emerge victorious in this opening round? Ladies and gentlemen, hold your breath and watch!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Confidence stands tall as the challenger's mightiest weapon. Who will emerge victorious in this opening round? Ladies and gentlemen, hold your breath and watch!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Ladies and gentlemen, what an exhilarating showdown! In the opening round, Rover demonstrated incredible prowess, triumphing over Exile the Danger.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Now, brace yourselves for the second round, featuring none other than Wildwolf, hailed as the Dream Crusher among challengers, accompanied by his loyal TD, "Hornet"!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Wildwolf, facing a fierce newcomer today. Any fiery words for your opponent?

items.speaker: Wild Wolf
items.text: Fortunate for you to survive the initial round, but your luck runs out here.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Rover, your chance to respond!

options.text: Eye for an eye, tooth for a tooth.
Act Two: Prepare for Defeat! Hornet.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Ohhh! The tension between these two contenders is palpable. Keep your eyes glued to the action, as the second round is about to unfold!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Making a debut but conquering two prominent challengers, Rover is just a step away from clinching the ticket to the championship!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Now, let's introduce the opponent for the final round. Can she thwart Rover's relentless march forward?

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: A frequent finalist, renowned as the "Echo Master" in the Seaside Arena, let's welcome Crazy Tif!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Tif, any words of wisdom for this emerging dark horse?

items.speaker: Crazy Tiff
items.text: HAHA... HAHAHA...

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Did everyone catch that? The commanding aura of Crazy Tif is apparent even before the match!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Confronted with such a formidable opponent, how will Rover respond?

options.text: Act Three: Keep Composure! Victory is Mine.

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Both competitors are in high spirits. It looks like we're in for a thrilling showdown!

items.speaker: Presenter
items.text: Will it be a legendary defense of the championship ticket, or will the dark horse emerge victorious? Let's wait and see.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Impressive, snagging a ticket to challenge me on your first attempt. Well done, well done indeed.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Looks like I'll need to give it my all. The final is tomorrow at noon. Don't back away in fear, okay?

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: I'll demonstrate what true strength is.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: By the way, Rover, there are a few things about tomorrow's final that I haven't mentioned yet.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Since it's your first participation, there are some variations in the rules compared to regular matches. You should familiarize yourself with them before the final.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Meet me at the elevated platform at the camp, and I'll fill you in.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Rover, you made it. How's your experience with the Seaside Arena so far?

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Alright, no beating around the bush. To keep the Seaside Arena running smoothly, I'd like you to forfeit the match.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: The matches can proceed seamlessly because of our management.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: However, you've become a threat to our control over the matches.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: The matches aren't just competitions; they assist in resolving conflicts and distributing resources among factions.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: The Hyenas call this place home, so you should understand.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Besides, with two victories under your belt, you should be in for some substantial rewards. If you agree, we'll consider granting The Hyenas more privileges in the future.

options.text: It's just your excuse for exploiting others.
It's not an excuse for exploiting others.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: No rush. How about you return and gather opinions from other members? The right choice will become evident.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: You have until tomorrow noon to think it over. Take your time.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: No need to think about it. Rover must has {Male=his;Female=her} own answer.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: It's just another trap set by you. Am I right?

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Hahaha, I was curious why there's a formidable participant stepping into the Arena without prior notice.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: It seems you've tampered with the reports.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: I merely bided my time for the right moment. As Rover pointed out, it's nothing more than your pretext for exploiting the vulnerable.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: The Seaside Arena has completely lost its integrity. It has devolved into a means to fulfill your insatiable greed. I refuse to be manipulated like a mere puppet.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Alright, given the circumstances, it appears that a showdown between us is unavoidable.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: I'll settle things in our match tomorrow. Don't worry; I'll ensure you accept your defeat without any complaint.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Hmph, you came.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Hope you won't disppoint me, Rover!

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: How… IMPOSSIBLE! How could I lose!

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Since you've lost, it's time to fulfill your promise according to the rules.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Shoot. What do you want? Power, money, or your faction's status?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Rover, you're the winner, so it's up to you to answer.
You tell Zeyuan and Exile Examiner's wishes to him.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: "One thrives, all thrive; one declines, all decline." The Hyenas is still as naïve as ever.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: If my memory serves me right, your faction received assistance from The Hyenas, correct?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Without such naivety, would your faction have attained its current status?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Rover, can you add an additional condition?

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Have the defeated party publicly declare the victor's terms to everyone in the camp.

items.speaker: Gladiator Champion
items.text: Why go through the trouble?

options.text: Everyone ought to listen to our terms.

items.speaker: Training Exile
items.text: Alright, I'll take him to the center of the camp. I'll catch up with you shortly.
